evals.prompt: Create RSA ads based on the following analysis. The analysis covers SafeTeam's camera surveillance page. One keyword cluster: 'Camera surveillance HOA' with keywords: "camera surveillance HOA", "video surveillance HOA", "surveillance camera HOA", "camera surveillance housing cooperative", "camera surveillance garage HOA", "camera surveillance parking garage HOA", "camera surveillance stairwell HOA", "camera surveillance waste room HOA". Target segment: HOA board members. Offer: camera surveillance. Search intent: transactional. Location targeting: National. Final URL: https://safeteam.se/services/camera-surveillance/. Sender: SafeTeam (30+ years experience, own 24/7 monitoring center, full service from design to installation to maintenance). No additional marketing context.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown file with complete RSA ad copy: Campaign name, Ad group name, all keywords listed, location targeting, final URL, display paths (max 15 chars each), 15 headlines (max 30 chars each, mix of keyword match/benefit/credibility/differentiation/CTA with correct pinning), 4 descriptions (max 90 chars each with correct pinning). No annotations after ad text. Validation script should pass.

evals.prompt: Now I want ads. Use the analysis file at analysis.md which covers Spiris accounting software. Create ads for two clusters: 1) 'Accounting software' (keywords: "accounting software", "accounting software sole proprietorship", "accounting software limited company", "accounting software online", "accounting software cloud-based", "accounting app", "accounting system", "financial software") targeting sole proprietors, commercial investigation intent. 2) 'Accounting software startup' (keywords: "accounting software startup", "accounting software new business", "bookkeeping new company", "cheap accounting software startup") targeting new business owners, transactional intent. National. URL: spiris.se/ekonomiplattform/bokforing-fakturering. CTA: 'Try for free'. Spiris (formerly Visma eEkonomi), prices from 199 SEK/month, new businesses get half price.
evals.expected_output: Two Markdown files (one per cluster) in a campaign folder. Each with complete RSA structure, correct field names, 15 headlines and 4 descriptions within character limits. The startup cluster should leverage the half-price offer. Validation script should pass on both files.
